response:
subject: Thank you for your assistance  

body:  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I would like to clarify that the current machine vision system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data provided, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference.  

Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, specifically page 18, for detailed datasheet information, and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13, for Quantum efficiency details.  

I will carefully study these files and manuals and get back to you with further insights.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
